title: Hi, I'm Siyuan Qian
tagline: I'm a Ph.D. candidate at Peking University HMI Lab, advised by Prof. Shanghang Zhang. My research centers on Embodied AI, with interests in VLA and World Models. I mainly investigate long-horizon robotic tasks in mobile manipulation and ultra-long-horizon manipulation scenarios.

skills.name: Embodied AI
skills.description: Building AI systems that perceive, reason, and act through robots in physical environments.

skills.name: Vision-Language-Action Models
skills.description: Models that map multimodal observations and language goals into executable robot actions.

skills.name: World Models
skills.description: Learning predictive models of environment dynamics for planning and long-horizon decision-making.

skills.name: Vision-Language Models
skills.description: Multimodal perception and reasoning over images, videos, and language instructions.

skills.name: Mobile Manipulation
skills.description: Whole-body and mobile-base manipulation with real robotic platforms.

skills.name: PyTorch
skills.description: Deep learning training, evaluation, and deployment workflows.

skills.name: ROS/ROS2
skills.description: Robot middleware for sensors, control, data collection, and system integration.

skills.name: Robot Simulators
skills.description: Simulation pipelines for data generation, benchmarking, and task validation.

skills.name: 3D Printing
skills.description: Rapid hardware prototyping for robot components and experimental fixtures.

skills.name: VR Teleoperation
skills.description: Human data collection and robot control through immersive teleoperation interfaces.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Systems
skills.description: Coordination and interaction among multiple agents in embodied environments.

skills.name: Research-to-Deployment
skills.description: Taking models from papers and benchmarks into real robot systems.

skills.name: Human-in-the-Loop RL
skills.description: Using online human feedback to improve robustness and adaptation.

skills.name: World Action Models
skills.description: Action-aware world models for long-horizon embodied task planning.

skills.name: Proprioceptive Modeling
skills.description: Modeling joint, force, and robot-state signals to improve action generation.
